name: Dinner Dilema Polenta with Sausage and Broccoli
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the canned chicken broth and 3/4 cup of water in a microwave-safe measuring cup or bowl.
Cover and microwave on high, stirring three times, for 13-15 minutes or until thickened and smooth. Stir in the ricotta cheese.
2. Cook the Italian sausage in a large nonstick skillet over medium-high heat for 3 minutes, until no longer pink. Break up clumps with the back of a spoon. Drain on a paper towel-lined plate.
3. Add the minced garlic and remaining 1/2 cup water to the skillet. Cover and bring to a boil.
4. Add the sausage and broccoli to the skillet. Cover and simmer for 3 minutes or until tender crisp.
5. Remove from heat and stir in the diced tomatoes.
6. Serve hot polenta on plates, topped with the sausage mixture.
Per Serving: 413 calories, 24g protein, 32g carbohydrates, 5g fiber, 21g fat (8g saturated), 63mg cholesterol, 1,090mg sodium
